title: Populists and progressives lead latest political party ratings in Latvia
summary_full: With parliamentary elections looming on October 3rd, Latvia's political parties continue to jostle for voters' affections, as demonstrated by the latest SKDS poll for Latvian Television.
summary_public: With parliamentary elections looming on October 3rd, Latvia's political parties continue to jostle for voters' affections, as demonstrated by the latest SKDS poll for Latvian Television.

LV.label: neutral
